rule.name: At this moment there are $(file_count) files monitored and the limit is $(file_limit).
rule.description: At this moment there are $(file_count) files monitored and the limit is $(file_limit).
rule.query:
<if_sid>230</if_sid>
    <field name="alert_type">normal</field>
    <field name="fim_db_table">file_entry</field>
    <description>At this moment there are $(file_count) files monitored and the limit is $(file_limit).</description>
    <group>syscheck,fim_db_state,</group>
